tasks.label: Format Files
tasks.command: cd ${workspaceFolder} && .venv/bin/python -m black DeepFilterNet/df_mlx/ && .venv/bin/python -m isort --profile black DeepFilterNet/df_mlx/

tasks.label: Verify state
tasks.command: cd ${workspaceFolder} && git log --oneline -5 && echo '---' && git status --short
